calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Termination Of Trust On Waiver Of Accounting Because Of Changed Circumstances And By Agreement Of All Trust Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Dec-20-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Watson for Petitioners.

Mr. Watson presented oral argument to support his position. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Tauscher.
